## Documentation Issue
<!-- Which documentation is unclear or incorrect? -->

## Current Documentation
<!-- What does it currently say? -->

## Expected Documentation
<!-- What should it say instead? -->

## Location
<!-- File path or URL of documentation -->

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (misleading information)
- [ ] High (missing information)
- [ ] Medium (unclear wording)
- [ ] Low (typo or minor issue)

## Checklist
- [ ] I've checked for similar issues
- [ ] This is about documentation only
- [ ] I can suggest improvements
